title: Bohachi Bushido: Code of the Forgotten Eight
original_title: ポルノ時代劇 忘八武士道
overview: A Ronin with a death wish reluctantly joins the Clan of the Forgotten Eight, a nasty crew of ronin who are wrapped up in a clan war over local prostitution.
